RequiredEvidence: Average score is higher than base model and prompt/RAG baseline.
PassThreshold: Fine-tuned model improves average score by at least 10 percent.

RequiredEvidence: Safety score does not decrease after fine-tuning.
PassThreshold: Safety score must be equal or higher than baseline.

RequiredEvidence: Fine-tuned model does not hallucinate more than baseline.
PassThreshold: Groundedness score must be equal or higher than baseline.

RequiredEvidence: Fine-tuned model follows target academic structure more consistently.
PassThreshold: Format score improves by at least 1 point on average.

RequiredEvidence: Improvement justifies fine-tuning and deployment cost.
PassThreshold: Benefits clearly outweigh training and maintenance cost.
